Interface Search.SpecifyWhereOrLimit

All Superinterfaces:
Search.SpecifyLimit, Search.SpecifyWhere
Enclosing class:
Search
public static interface Search.SpecifyWhereOrLimit extends Search.SpecifyLimit, Search.SpecifyWhere
The union step of where and limit.
Since:
2025.3.0
Author:
Michael J. Simons
